rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee declarations in component type scopes for interface behavior, not implementation scopes
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks to contain AGREE contract elements
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants in AGREE expressions when available
Structure AGREE contracts with clear labels for assumptions and guarantees
Declare constants and equations in component type annexes for interface-level contracts
Assignments and implementation bindings go in component implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; eq name : type = expression; const name : type = value; assign output = expression;
Component type contracts are scoped to component type declarations, not implementations
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assign clauses in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
